name: Selvaag Bolig ASA
summary: Selvaag Bolig ASA, a housing development company, engages in the construction and sale of residential properties in Greater Oslo, Bergen, Stavanger, Trondheim, and Stockholm. The company offers its properties under the Start, Home, and Pluss brands. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway. Selvaag Bolig ASA is a subsidiary of Selvaag AS.
